use_codes.desc: CLOLAR IS INDICATED FOR THE TREATMENT OF PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 1 TO 21 YEARS OLD WITH RELAPSED OR REFRACTORY ACUTE LYMPHOBLASTIC LEUKEMIA AFTER AT LEAST TWO PRIOR REGIMENS

indications.text:
Clolar is indicated for the treatment of pediatric patients 1 to 21 years old with relapsed or
refractory acute lymphoblastic leukemia after at least two prior regimens.

Clolar (clofarabine) Injection is indicated for the treatment of pediatric patients 1 to 21 years
old with relapsed or refractory acute lymphoblastic leukemia after at least two prior regimens.
This indication is based upon response rate. There are no trials verifying an improvement in
